data.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Slip As September CPI Data Looms, Tesla On Radar Ahead Of Robotaxi Event: Strategist Offers Stock Tips Aligned With Presidential Candidates' Trade Policies
data.description: The imminent release of the September consumer price inflation report is keeping sentiment guarded as the index futures trade modestly lower early Thursday.

data.title: Palantir's Stake In EV Maker Faraday Future Touch Nearly 9% After Converting Receivables Into Equity
data.description: Palantir Technologies now has an 8.7% stake in California-based EV maker Faraday Future, according to a filing made by the data analytics company with the SEC.

data.title: Jeff Bezos-Led Amazon Almost Ran Out Of Cash 24 Years Ago. At $400B, It Is Now Projected To Have As Much Cash As Apple And Microsoft Combined By 2027: Here's More
data.description: Amazon is expected to have nearly as much cash on its balance sheet as rivals Apple and Microsoft combined by 2027.

data.title: This Honeywell Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Thursday
Fastenal Gears Up For Q3 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
